title: schizoloma retusum
intro: Schizoloma retusum, also known as the rough fork fern, is a species of fern native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Schizoloma retusum include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
